creator: demelier.david@gmail.com
text:
Sometime when I just install a new FreeBSD, I don't check if I installed every applications I needed. And I'm always surprised to see that xmessage and xfontsel are missing by default after installing x11/xorg.

Of course these are not really needed to run X properly but because these applications are parts of X.org I would like to add them as options into x11/xorg-apps.
